case_title: RIVAS, LIDIA vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MUNI. RAILWAY et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVAS, LIDIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
WHARRIS, JUDGE; JWILSON, CLERK; DCHEN, CSR. TRIAL RESUMES. OPENING STATEMENTS GIVEN. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. RECESS UNTIL 9:15 A.M, 28 OCT 99.

WHARRIS, JUDGE; PYEN, CLERK; DCHEN, CSR. TRIAL RESUMES. ARGUMENT GIVEN. JURY INSTRUCTED. AT 2:15 P.M. JURY RETIRES TO BEGIN DELIBERATION. AT 5:00, JURY ADMONISHED AND CAUSE CONTINUED TO 9:00 A.M, 29 OCT 99.

WHARRIS, JUDGE; PYEN, CLERK; DCHEN, CSR. TRIAL RESUMES IN DEPT 414. JURY RETIRES FOR FURTHER DELIB- ERATION. JURY RETURNS AT 10:50 WITH VERDICT FOR PLAINTIFF LIDIA RIVAS AND AGAINST DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IN THE SUM OF $6209.00 WITH 40% CONTRIBUTORY NEGLIGENCE ATTRIBUTED TO PLAINTIFF. JURY POLLED AND EXCUSED.
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MUNI. RAILWAY $3,725.40 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,725.40
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
